summary: Iter11 backend + frontend verification. ALL 22/22 iter11 backend pytest cases PASS. Covers: (a) GET /api/admin/users/template.csv returns CSV with 6-column header (name,email,username,whatsapp,gender,password) + 2 sample rows, admin-gated (non-admin 403); (b) GET/PUT /api/admin/general-config — default 'patungan123' returned, PUT with valid pw persists, PUT with <6-char pw → 422; (c) GET/PUT /api/admin/invoice-config — default {day_of_month:1, due_days:7, enabled:true}, valid PUT persists round-trip, day_of_month=0 or 29 → 422, due_days=0 or 61 → 422; (d) PUT /api/admin/payment-config midtrans_fee_percent = -1/101/200 → 422, 5.0 → 200 (Field bound ge=0,le=100 enforced); (e) POST /api/admin/users/import — CSV missing 'email' header → 400 'kolom email wajib'; non-admin → 403; data URL payload accepted; empty password row auto-logs in with global default_new_user_password; invalid email → errors[]; duplicate email → skipped[]; 3-valid+1-dup batch → summary {created:3, skipped:1, errors:0}; (f) POST /api/admin/invoices/generate-now full E2E — imported 3 users via CSV → created 3 active subs (prices 45k/55k/65k) → run generate-now creates 3 auto-generated payments with amount=base_amount=sub.price, status='pending', payment_method=null, auto_generated=true, period_label=current 'Mon YYYY', due_date set; re-running does NOT duplicate; adding a NEW active sub then re-running only creates 1 new invoice (existing 3 remain single); non-admin → 403. Frontend UI: admin dashboard shows new [admin-tab-auto-invoice] tab; clicking it renders [auto-invoice-tab] with [invoice-day-input], [invoice-due-input], [invoice-enabled], [invoice-config-save], [invoice-run-now], [general-default-pw], [general-config-save] all visible. Users tab shows new [users-template-csv], [users-import-csv], [users-export-csv] buttons. Import modal opens with [import-file-input] + [import-submit]; uploading a 3-user CSV displays result panel with '3 DIBUAT, 0 DILEWATI, 0 ERROR' and shows 'Password default digunakan untuk yang kosong: patungan123', with success toast 'Selesai: 3 dibuat, 0 dilewati, 0 error'. Template CSV button clickable without JS error. No frontend console errors (only benign recharts width-0 warnings).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py now 1615 lines — well past the 700-line guideline. Extract admin config endpoints (invoice-config, general-config, payment-config) into routers/settings.py, and bulk-import + template into routers/admin_users.py to align with existing routers/groups.py split pattern.

_run_invoice_generator uses now_utc() for the period_label ('%b %Y') and due_date base. Consider explicit tz handling if admins operate on Jakarta time — a job that runs at 23:59 WIB on day-1 could still trigger correctly, but log timezone in response for clarity.

Scheduler tick interval is 3600s (1h) and now runs BOTH reminders + invoice generator every hour. Because generator gates on now.day == day_of_month, it will fire up to 24 times on the target day. That's fine (idempotent) but slightly wasteful; consider a flag {last_run_period_label} in settings to short-circuit repeat scans within same period.

import_users_csv: on DB-level failure (e.g. duplicate username unique index), the row goes into errors[] with raw exception string — consider sanitizing so raw pymongo error messages aren't surfaced to admin UI.

AutoInvoiceTab.jsx imports { Lightning, Key } from @phosphor-icons/react — both render fine in this build, but 'Lightning' is deprecated in newer phosphor versions (renamed 'Lightning'/'LightningA'). Not blocking now.
No admin UI surface to list/delete auto-generated invoices in bulk if a misfire occurs — the existing Payments tab works but a filter by auto_generated=true would help ops.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all iter11 UI surfaces verified: Auto Invoice tab, config forms, generate-now button, Users template/import/export buttons, import modal with 3/0/0 result panel + toast)

seed_data_creation: Several iter11-prefixed users created via CSV import + admin create, plus 4 active subscriptions and ~4 auto-generated pending payments in the current period. Test fixture calls /api/admin/cleanup-test-users?prefix=iter11 & Iter11 in teardown_module to remove them and cascade-delete their subs+payments. NOTE: auto-generated payments for pre-existing non-iter11 subs from previous iterations (~36 subs) will also have been created during E2E generate-now run — those are legitimate pending invoices for existing test data and remain in the DB. Admin can bulk-delete via db shell using {auto_generated: true} filter if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter11 fully green. Bulk CSV import + auto-invoice generator + configurable schedule + midtrans fee bounds all working. Next iterations: watch that generate-now can create hundreds of invoices on databases with many active subs (currently ~36 subs → 36 invoices in one call — no pagination). Consider testing invoice-config day_of_month=28 wrap behavior on Feb (28 always safe by Field(le=28) — good design). Frontend Lightning icon warning benign. Admin login credentials unchanged.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in iter11 scope.
